Defines RTC backup register mappings for boot and system state information.

# Purpose
This code is a C header file that defines a set of preprocessor macros for backup data registers used in a real-time clock (RTC) system. Each macro associates a descriptive name with a specific RTC backup data register, such as `RTC_BKP_DR0` through `RTC_BKP_DR19`. These macros are used to store and retrieve various system states and configuration values, such as boot information, reboot reasons, and magnetic correction values. The use of these macros helps to improve code readability and maintainability by providing meaningful names for the RTC backup registers.
